---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

::: {.paper}
### Paper Title Here
with Coauthor Name (University)

Abstract text goes here. Describe the research question, methods, and key findings in a few sentences.

[[Paper]{.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}](papers/paper1.pdf)
[[Slides]{.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}](slides/paper1-slides.pdf)
:::

::: {.paper}
### Another Paper Title
Solo-authored

Abstract text goes here.

[[Paper]{.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}](#)
:::

## Work in Progress

- **Project title** — Brief one-line description.
- **Another project** (with Coauthor) — Brief description.

## Publications

::: {.paper}
### Published Paper Title
with Coauthor Name. *Journal Name*, Vol(Issue), Year.

[[Published Version]{.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}](#)
[[Working Paper]{.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}](#)
:::
